# Upload Checklist — A once-in-a-generation opportunity?

Runtime: 6:54
Cast: Luxon, Freire

## Substack (recommended primary surface)
- MP3: `india-fta.mp3`
- Embed snippet: `embed.substack.html`
- Post text: `dist/captions/substack.txt`
- Or run: `python -m kd.publish_audio episodes/002-india-fta --target substack`

## Website (six-thinkers hub)
- Raw MP3 URL (after github push) is auto-filled into `embed.html`.
- Waveform image: `india-fta.waveform.png`

## X / Twitter
- Media: attach `india-fta.waveform.png` as image, link to Substack post
- Post text: `dist/captions/x.txt`

## Show notes / description
- Content: `dist/captions/notes.txt` (includes chapter markers)
- Transcript: `transcript.md`
